Pick the right template for your change instead of this default:

- Adding / editing registry records:
  ?expand=1&template=registry-update.md
- Changing structure (columns, docs, templates, repo config):
  ?expand=1&template=schema-change.md

https://github.com/vig-os/part-registry/compare/main...your-branch?expand=1&template=registry-update.md

## Type of change

PR templates are keyed to *what* changes; the issue (feature / bug / chore /
registry change request) captures intent.

- [ ] Registry data update (records) — see `registry-update.md`
- [ ] Structure change (columns / docs / templates / config) — see `schema-change.md`
